axes.title: EEG -> AKIDA spike pipeline (foundation)
axes.falsifier: F-A1 (5x latency, N-2 native) + F-AK-3 (spike rate < 1/s)

axes.title: CLM x AKIDA Phi (last-layer projection)
axes.falsifier: T-A surrogate Pearson r >= 0.85 between Phi_clm and Phi_akida
axes.method: JL projection 768->16, quantize uint8 4-bit, NHWC reshape (1,1,16,16)

axes.title: 3-axis Landauer (CLM x EEG x AKIDA energy)
axes.method: AKIDA datasheet pJ/spike + EEG biology (Drubach 2000 ~25 fJ/spike) + CLM GPU thermal wattmeter

axes.title: 3-axis GWT broadcast
axes.falsifier: cross-correlation matrix non-trivial at lag 0 across CLM L_IX / EEG alpha Kuramoto / AKIDA last-layer

axes.title: AKIDA x QRNG spike noise floor
axes.falsifier: spike-noise floor distinguishable from quantum baseline (KS p < 0.01)
axes.method: 1000 zero-input forward calls vs 1000 ANU QRNG-seeded uint8 input

axes.title: AKIDA x SIM-universe limit saturation
axes.falsifier: SIM coherence varies with AKIDA load (signed corr at 1500 fps saturation)

cascade_observations: N-2 is the single point of failure: PASS unblocks 5 downstream axes; FAIL collapses cascade
D+3 has parallel completions (N-4 + N-7) -- both depend only on N-2
Total critical path: D+1 (N-2) -> D+5 (N-8) = 5 days from arrival
Total budget $0-4 (effectively zero); blocker is hardware arrival ETA, not capex
